details.productUrlName: All Seeing Toby Sovereign Okinec Ahau

customAttributes.description:
Toby's Journey By Gary Baseman

Ward 2
Whenever All-Seeing Toby attacks, for each creature you control with power greater than that creature's base power, put a number of +1/+1 counters on that creature equal to the difference.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in Secret Lair Drop: Toby's Journey By Gary Baseman and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 6/19/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: The keeper of your truth! He both supports and accompanies you on your way.
